title: aira variegata
intro: Aira variegata, also known as variegated oat grass or variegated oat-grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aira variegata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Aira variegata can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent like ethanol.
